sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds: Battle Born Pond, Davis Creek Pond, Idlewild Ponds, Marilyn's Pond, Paradise Ponds, Rancho San Rafael Pond, Sparks Marina Pond, Verdi Pond, Virginia Lake and Wilson Common. Open year around. Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish. Hours parks are open to public use.

sources.title: Wilson Common Pond — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: The pond covers approximately one surface acre, is 15 feet deep, and receives water from Franktown Creek. The fishery is managed for put-and-take and fish are stocked and caught quickly by anglers. It is a great place for kids to fish since few trees interfere with casting. Stocking Updates: 303 Rainbow Trout, 10.1 in, 04-27-2026; 498 Rainbow Trout, 10.1 in, 04-08-2026; 501 Rainbow Trout, 9.3 in, 03-26-2026; 151 Rainbow Trout, 9.0 in, 03-10-2026; 49 Rainbow Trout, 9.2 in, 03-10-2026; 488 Rainbow Trout, 10.0 in, 10-06-2025; 509 Rainbow Trout, 10.0 in, 09-25-2025; 493 Rainbow Trout, 9.7 in, 05-16-2025; 490 Rainbow Trout, 9.6 in, 04-25-2025; 500 Rainbow Trout, 9.7 in, 03-06-2025; 502 Rainbow Trout, 9.6 in, 10-23-2024; 438 Rainbow Trout, 11.3 in, 09-26-2024; 630 Rainbow Trout, 10.3 in, 05-29-2024; 396 Rainbow Trout, 9.8 in, 05-16-2024; 417 Rainbow Trout, 9.7 in, 04-16-2024; 270 Rainbow Trout, 9.7 in, 04-01-2024; 508 Rainbow Trout, 9.5 in, 10-10-2023; 507 Rainbow Trout, 9.2 in, 09-27-2023; 506 Rainbow Trout, 10 in, 05-16-2023; 511 Rainbow Trout, 9.7 in, 05-02-2023; 500 Rainbow Trout, 10.2 in, 04-20-2023; 503 Rainbow Trout, 9.7 in, 04-11-2023.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Wilson Common is open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: No species-specific sub-limit is stated for Wilson Common in NDOW's current regulation table; the limit applies to the combined daily/possession total across all game fish species.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds (incl. Wilson Common)
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit 3 game fish; possession limit 6 game fish (all species combined) at Wilson Common.
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish.

parameters.note: NDOW's commission-regulation table lists hours for Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds generically as 'hours parks are open to public use'; no fixed clock times or sunrise/sunset offsets are specified for Wilson Common (within Wilson Commons Park, a Washoe County Regional Parks and Open Space facility in Washoe Valley).

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing at Wilson Common is allowed during the hours the park is open to the public.
regulations.verbatimText: Hours parks are open to public use

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older; no water-specific permit exists for Wilson Common.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older at Wilson Common; no license is required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
